summary: Turn your AI agents from interns to veterans Discussion | Link
content: Hyper is the company brain that learns everything about your company (Docs, Slack, Email, Calendar, etc) then plugs into your AI skills & agents & automations so they go from forgetful interns into seasoned veterans that accomplish tasks. It helps them drafts emails in your voice, reads your contracts, triages your tickets, and preps you for every meeting, because it knows everything everyone at your company knows. Give it a spin from our website!
chineseSummary: 将你的人工智能代理从实习生变成退伍军人关联
chineseContent: Hyper 是公司的大脑，它可以了解有关公司的所有信息（文档、Slack、电子邮件、日历等），然后插入您的 AI 技能、代理和自动化，使他们从健忘的实习生变成经验丰富的老手来完成任务。它可以帮助他们用您的声音起草电子邮件、阅读您的合同、对您的门票进行分类，并为您准备每次会议，因为它知道您公司中每个人都知道的一切。从我们的网站上试一试吧！
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
